intro: Over nine articles published between April 18 and April 28, 2026, the ZDI tag covers vulnerabilities including CVE-2026-22898, CVE-2026-6406, CVE-2026-41276, CVE-2026-25203, and CVE-2026-5424, with severity scores ranging from 7.8 to 8.8. The affected sectors span software development, technology, critical infrastructure, digital signage, and energy, with a global regional impact. The severity mix includes seven high, one low, and one critical rated issue.
